$comment: mimi. monorepo worker registry. workers/workers.json is gitignored by the notion CLI (it contains tenant-specific workspaceId/workerId), so we commit this manifest instead. used by docs + deploy scripts to enumerate workers.

workers.name: mimi-thumbnail-render
workers.description: live SVG pixel-art thumbnail of the room

workers.name: mimi-mcp-server
workers.description: MCP server exposing mimi. tools to any external AI

workers.name: mimi-notion-agents
workers.description: sponsor flex: wraps the official notion-agents-sdk-js so mimi. can summon notion-hosted custom agents
